text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Utter failure... To think this would be my result...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I devoted every waking second to training for
today.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I am in good condition, and I even devised
strategies to contend with my rivals.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
choice_data_list: Because you're not strong enough yet.
Because you're not strong enough yet.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
choice_data_list: Because you're not strong enough yet.
Because you're not strong enough yet.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
They are? Yes, perhaps... After all, there are
plenty of factors outside my control that affect a
race.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
As they say, "It all comes down to luck." There are
times when effort alone cannot bring forth
victory.
choice_data_list: You've done all you can. You'll get it next time.
You've done all you can. You'll get it next time.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you. I feel slightly better now.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I promise not to let the lesson of this loss nor the
fruits of my training thus far go to waste.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Yes, you are correct... This is certainly a skill
issue...
choice_data_list: It's okay! Let's train even harder!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Yes... Stressing over this will not lead to victory.
Only hard work can do that.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Let's review today's race upon our return... I
refuse to lose next time!
